title: Skyblock Bazaar Cleaner (Hypixel)
description: This mod aims at cleaning up the chat when interacting with the bazaar in Hypixel Skyblock.
body:
## Skyblock Bazaar Cleaner
### QOL. Client-Sided. Chat Clearing
Say goodbye to bazaar spam and hello to clean, crisp chat! Instantly remove all unnecessary messages from the Hypixel Skyblock Bazaar so you can focus on trading, farming, and dominating the market without clutter slowing you down.

## 💎 Why Bazaar Cleaner?

- **Client-Sided** — Only you see it, works perfectly anywhere without affecting others.

- **Performance Friendly** — Smooth, lightweight, and invisible while you play.

- **Instant Focus** — Removes spam automatically, keeping your chat sharp and readable.

- **Perfect For:** fast flipping, efficiency runs, and keeping your Skyblock experience sleek.

![Showing the logs that bazaar cleaner removes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62ac38f7041f37ff17dc2d820bc6ae3c53d12c65.png)
